name: Crop-Spray Speed-Controlled Mission
description: You are an Agricultural Technician. The Murray Valley Soybean Cooperative has contracted a drone spraying service to apply herbicide to a soybean block. Using the specifications provided in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/spray_spec.txt, create a mission plan in QGroundControl. The mission must include a takeoff, high-speed transit waypoints, DO_CHANGE_SPEED commands for ground speed control, low-altitude spray waypoints, and a Return to Launch (RTL) command. Save the completed mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/spray_mission.plan.
